title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 20 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 20 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 20 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/11/2025
Today, DCE iron ore continued to weake trend today, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 788.5 yuan,down 0.32% from the previous trading day. Traders demonstrated a moderate willingness to sell, while steel mills purchased as needed. Overall market trading sentiment remained subdued.
